item.farmersmarket.enderman_pendant: Eye of Ender, Bound By Fate
enchantment.farmersmarket.hunterslullaby: Inflicting hit gives Slowness and Mining fatigue
enchantment.farmersmarket.starvation.des: The less hunger you have, the more damage you do
enchantment.farmersmarket.shockwaveencha: Launch yourself away using a arrow, or a firework
Give into the hunt and rip into your prey, gives chance for strength and speed, but also a chance for blindness and weakness
enchantment.farmersmarket.calciuminfused: Prot 1 for stuff like Fire Protection, to allow generalization, not for Protection, only stuff like feather fall, projectile protection, etc
enchantment.farmersmarket.jagerderschuld: Conditional sharpness, after loosing a set amount of health, you gain sharpness
enchantment.farmersmarket.lavawader.desc: Gain fire damage reduction, and move Faster through lava
enchantment.farmersmarket.forging.desc: All items with a blast furnace recipe automatically get smelted :D
enchantment.farmersmarket.syphon.desc: §eChanges right click of the HexSpade to instead use 'Charge' to heal yourself
enchantment.farmersmarket.riposte.desc: Exchanges the Strong dash for a Shorter dash costing half of the charge
enchantment.farmersmarket.shout.desc: Embrase the rage, overcharging your sword, changing the strengthening into an AOE debuff, while buffing you
enchantment.farmersmarket.inferno.desc: Change the Empowered pull for a wide AOE fire burst to make your enemies turn into ash
enchantment.farmersmarket.freezerburn.de: Change the Empowered pull for a wide AOE ice burst to make your enemies get frostbite
enchantment.farmersmarket.rusted.desc: Propel the rust as a single hitscan projectile instead of the AOE
enchantment.farmersmarket.sharpen.desc: §5Exchange your Aoe for extra damage, make sure to resharpen it!
enchantment.farmersmarket.bracing.desc: Take less damage from Colliding with walls stalagmites and the ground
enchantment.farmersmarket.wyrmstride.des: Channel the Wyrm's power as you Dash through lava as well as when on fire
enchantment.farmersmarket.windblessing.d: The wind has blessed your leggings, granting you increased speed, but beware, wearing these leggings your hunger to go down faster
enchantment.farmersmarket.gluttony.desc: This enchant allows you to double your hunger bar, letting you store more saturation, but keep in mind, you have two  full hunger bars before you can eat again.
enchantment.farmersmarket.freshfeildsenc: When you break a crop with this hoe, and it is fully grown, it will replant and bonemeal it
enchantment.farmersmarket.adaptability.d: Wearing this lets your body adapt to damage, the more you take, the more you resist, but beware, each other type removes some of your current adaptation.
farmersmarket.midnightconfig.title: Farmers Market Config
tooltip.farmersmarket.divinity.tooltip: This Pure Divinity desires a catalyst to express itself.
tooltip.farmersmarket.divinity.tooltip2: The first is a being who has wings from the heavens,
tooltip.farmersmarket.divinity.tooltip3: the second is a vessel of holy light,
tooltip.farmersmarket.divinity.tooltip4: and the third is a creature made of darkness, stuck in a ruined city.
item.farmersmarket.third_abyss: Expression of the Void. Ceaseless Void
item.farmersmarket.second_abyss: Expression of the Void. Symphony of the night
item.farmersmarket.first_abyss: Expression of the Void. Shackles of the first sinner
item.farmersmarket.third_div: Expression of Divinity. Guardian of the heart
item.farmersmarket.first_div: Expression of divinity. Wings of the forefather
tooltip.farmersmarket.abyss.tooltip: This Shard of the Abyss Desires a form to restrict those above it
tooltip.farmersmarket.abyss.tooltip2: The first is a being who guards those who are undeserving,
tooltip.farmersmarket.abyss.tooltip3: the second is a witness to a pirate's adventure,
tooltip.farmersmarket.abyss.tooltip4: and the third is a creature who has long lost it's original will, now guarding the dragon.
fm.warped_shadow: You have fallen out of the end
fm.warped_end: you have fallen back into the end
